title: SugarCane++
body:
SugarCane++ is a Fabric mod that allows server owners and players to customize sugar cane growth behavior. Configure growth speed multipliers from 0.1x to 100x and set maximum height limits from 1 to 256 blocks.

Features:
- Configurable growth speed multiplier (default: 3x, range: 0.1x-100x)
- Custom maximum height (default: 3 blocks, range: 1-256)
- Enable/disable toggle without uninstalling
- Automatic config file reloading (no server restart needed)
- Comprehensive in-game commands with tab completion
- Quick preset configurations (slow, normal, fast, ultra)
- Permission-based command system
- Input validation with automatic clamping

Commands:
- Public: /sugarcane help, /sugarcane info, /sugarcane getspeed
- Admin: /sugarcane setspeed, /sugarcane setmaxheight, /sugarcane preset, /sugarcane toggle, /sugarcane reset, /sugarcane reload

Configuration file is located at config/SugarCane++/config.json and automatically reloads when modified. Perfect for server owners who want fine-tuned control over crop growth rates.
